heading: Test pressure. The test pressure to be used shall be no less than 1½ times the proposed maximum working pressure, but not less than 10 psig.
verbatim:
(f)	Reserved.
Within a vented fireplace, the damper must be removed or welded open and glass doors installed over the fireplace opening.
Ordinance Nos. 7566 (2007); 7925 (2013); 7963 (2014); 8366 (2020); 8684 (2025)
